servicePage.title: Service & Help
servicePage.intro: We're here for you. Pick a topic on the left or jump straight to it via the address, e.g. /service#faq.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How can I track my order?
faq.a1: As soon as your order has shipped, you'll receive an email with a tracking link. You can also find the current status in your account under “Orders”.
faq.q2: Can I change or cancel my order?
faq.a2: As long as the order hasn't shipped yet, you can adjust or cancel it through our customer service. Please contact us as soon as possible.
faq.a3: You have 30 days to return items free of charge. Include the enclosed return label and drop the parcel off at a parcel shop.
faq.a4: Within Germany we ship free of charge from an order value of €50. Below that we charge a flat rate of €4.95.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.p1: We ship all orders within 24 hours on business days. Delivery within Germany usually takes 2–4 business days.
shipping.p2: Shipping within Germany is free from an order value of €50. Deliveries to other European countries have different lead times and costs, which are shown to you during checkout.
shipping.p3: As soon as your parcel leaves our warehouse, we'll notify you by email with a tracking link.

payment.title: Payment Methods
payment.intro: We offer you several secure payment methods:
payment.note: All payments are transmitted encrypted. For purchase on account, the amount is due within 14 days of receiving the goods.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.disclaimer: Note: Please replace the sample details below with your real company data.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.disclaimer: Note: This is a sample privacy text and does not constitute legal advice. Please adapt it to your company.
privacy.p1: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is Muster Shop GmbH, Musterstraße 1, 12345 Musterstadt.
privacy.p2: We only process personal data to the extent necessary to provide our shop, process your order and fulfil legal obligations.
privacy.p3: You have the right at any time to access, rectify, erase and restrict the processing of your data, as well as the right to data portability and objection.
privacy.p4: We use cookies to provide basic functions such as the shopping cart and your language preference. We only set non-essential cookies with your consent.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.acceptTerms: I accept all Terms and Conditions
checkout.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields correctly.
checkout.acceptTermsRequired: Please accept the Terms and Conditions.

auth.passwordRequirements: Your password must have at least 8 characters with one number, one upper and one lower case letter and one special character.
auth.registerFailed: Registration failed. Please check your details.
auth.orderNotFound: No order found for these details.

footer.disclaimer: *All prices include VAT, plus applicable shipping and delivery costs.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text1: This website is a portfolio project and not a real online store. All products, prices, and transactions displayed are fictional and exist solely to showcase my front-end development skills.
disclaimer.text2: If you're interested in my work, feel free to reach out!

errors.notFoundText: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved. Let's get you back on track.
errors.serverErrorText: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
